nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 菲律宾
nodes.summary: 菲律宾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联131种鸟类，包括细斑树鸭、青头潜鸭、菲律宾冢雉等131种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 小种群风险
nodes.summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。

nodes.name: Pink-bellied imperial pigeon
nodes.summary: Pink-bellied imperial pigeon（Pink-bellied imperial pigeon，学名 Ducula poliocephala），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于喬治·羅伯特·格雷、菲律宾，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、猎捕压力、小种群风险。

nodes.name: 喬治·羅伯特·格雷
nodes.summary: 喬治·羅伯特·格雷是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括褐鸭、銀鴿、Pink-bellied imperial pigeon等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 猎捕压力
nodes.summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pink-bellied imperial pigeon (Ducula poliocephala), also known as the zone-tailed pigeon, is found in the Philippines

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pink-bellied imperial pigeon (Ducula poliocephala), also known as the zone-tailed pigeon, is found in the Philippines

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Its natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forest and montane forest up to 1,500 m

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss. It is illegal to hunt, capture or possess these birds under Philippine Law RA 9147.{{Cite web |last=11th Congress |title=Republic Act No

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: According to the IUCN Red List and BirdLife International's Red Book, the pink-bellied imperial pigeon is classified as Near-threatened. However, The National List of Threatened Terrestrial Fauna of the Philippines has classified it as Critically Endangered. thumb This is due to the loss of habitat, trapping for the pet trade and hunting for food

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Although it occurs quite widely within the Philippines, this species is scarce and probably has a moderately small population, which is suspected to be in moderately rapid decline owing to hunting and the removal of its favoured lowland forest habitat. This bird is extremely rare in Luzon but frequently more commonly observed in Negros Island, Mindoro, Samar and Mindanao
